channel.title: EMERGENZ Biosecurity Intelligence Dashboard
channel.description: High-severity biosecurity signals and recent authority/media coverage. Generated 2026-05-25T10:22:49.240Z.

item.title: [ACTION] Ebola disease — Bundibugyo virus, Democratic Republic of the Congo
item.description: WHO has declared the Bundibugyo ebolavirus outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, with Africa CDC confirming active outbreak monitoring in both the DRC and Uganda. Multi-health-zone spread in eastern DRC continues; cross-border movement elevates geographic risk. Specific case and fatality counts require direct verification against the current WHO Disease Outbreak News (who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news) or Africa CDC epidemic intelligence report.

item.title: [CONCERN] Andes virus hantavirus cluster — MV Hondius travel-linked
item.description: Andes hantavirus cluster linked to a South America–Antarctica expedition cruise aboard MV Hondius. 11 reported cases (9 confirmed, 2 probable) and 3 deaths across multiple countries, with multinational case-finding and post-exposure monitoring continuing.

item.title: [CONCERN] Measles — United States
item.description: CDC confirmed 1,952 measles cases across 40 jurisdictions in 2026 (as of May 21), representing 29 outbreaks with 93% of cases outbreak-associated. No deaths reported in 2026. U.S. kindergartener MMR coverage has declined to 92.5% (from 95.2% in 2019–2020), leaving approximately 286,000 kindergarteners unvaccinated — the structural driver of sustained outbreak activity.

item.title: [CONCERN] Mpox — clade I, Africa & travel-linked importations
item.description: Mpox clade I and travel-linked importation monitoring remain operationally significant for clinical recognition, specimen routing, and laboratory clade differentiation. Verify current country-level trends and any importation details against specific Africa CDC, WHO, or CDC updates before publication.

item.title: [CONCERN] Cholera — sub-Saharan Africa, including Republic of Congo
item.description: Africa CDC reported 40,707 cholera cases continent-wide from January 1 through May 14, 2026 — a 65% year-over-year decline compared to the same period in 2025. Despite the overall volume decrease, case fatality ratios remain elevated in conflict-affected and low-healthcare-access settings. Sudan, Ethiopia, Somalia, Mozambique, Malawi, and Zimbabwe continue reporting active transmission.

item.title: [CONCERN] Chikungunya — global outbreak activity
item.description: Chikungunya surveillance remains active across parts of the Americas and other mosquito-active regions. Verify current country burden and case totals against specific PAHO or WHO updates before publication.

item.title: Google News: Pirbright study reveals mutations shaping H5 vaccine effectiveness - Poultry World
item.description: Pirbright study reveals mutations shaping H5 vaccine effectiveness Poultry World

item.title: NPR: In Beirut, refugee girls and women learn more than self-defense in martial arts class
item.description: In the male-dominated world of Palestinian refugee camps in Lebanon, a martial arts teacher offers women a way to empowerment.

item.title: Google News: How Congo is battling an Ebola outbreak complicated by aid cuts, armed rebels and anger - Los Angeles Times
item.description: How Congo is battling an Ebola outbreak complicated by aid cuts, armed rebels and anger Los Angeles Times

item.title: Google News: Nebraska's public health lab spun up a new hantavirus test in days - Omaha World-Herald
item.description: Nebraska's public health lab spun up a new hantavirus test in days Omaha World-Herald

item.title: Google News: Uganda confirms two more Ebola cases, taking total to seven - Reuters
item.description: Uganda confirms two more Ebola cases, taking total to seven Reuters

item.title: Google News: National Measles Vaccination Drive Sees Coverage Reach 89% In Paraguay - The Asunción Times
item.description: National Measles Vaccination Drive Sees Coverage Reach 89% In Paraguay The Asunción Times

item.title: Google News: Ebola May Have Killed Over 200 People in Congo as Violence Disrupts Response - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Ebola May Have Killed Over 200 People in Congo as Violence Disrupts Response Bloomberg.com

item.description: Mozambique to receive approximately 6.8 million doses of cholera aimnews.org

item.title: Google News: ActionAid DRC Rapid Needs Assessment Report - Ebola Virus Disease (EVD) Outbreak Response (May 2026) - ReliefWeb
item.description: ActionAid DRC Rapid Needs Assessment Report - Ebola Virus Disease (EVD) Outbreak Response (May 2026) ReliefWeb

item.title: NPR: 'My body carried me,' Elizabeth Smart says. Now she's celebrating it
item.description: Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.

item.title: NPR: COMIC: To raise a confident little talker, learn to speak 'parentese'
item.description: So you've got a baby in your life. How do you talk to them, exactly? In this comic, experts explain why conversing with your baby is important — and share ways to help them develop their language skills.

item.title: NPR: Spin to win: How this life insurance company turns healthy habits into a game
item.description: You've heard of lower car insurance rates for good drivers. Now, one life insurance company wants to incentivize longevity with lower rates and extra bonuses for people who adopt healthy habits.

item.title: Google News: AfDB meets under Ebola's cloud as Africa hunts for development cash at home - Reuters
item.description: AfDB meets under Ebola's cloud as Africa hunts for development cash at home Reuters

item.title: BBC Health: What to do if you think someone has heat exhaustion or heatstroke
item.description: Know the signs and what to do if someone is unwell in hot weather.
